data.metadata: {"description":"One of the first gigachads on Abstract and a prominent member of the Russian community. Highly experienced both in gaming and in the broader crypto space. A knowledgeable person and a real value add to the ecosystem"}

translation.translatedDescription: One of the first gigachads on Abstract and a prominent member of the Russian community. Highly experienced both in gaming and in the broader crypto space. A knowledgeable person and a real value add to the ecosystem

data.metadata: {"description":"Abschud is the ultimate representation of being part of Abstract. One of the core team members, especially together with Sauci, is always active and supportive. He supported my growth on X, just as he has for countless others. Truly a legend."}

{"description":"Cristian leads with love and positivity. His presence makes you feel warm and welcome in any community he is a part of. I had the great pleasure of meeting him in person at NFT NYC, and that only reinforced what I felt online. He is a gifted content creator who is able to pivot seamlessly from providing thoughtful analysis to contagious laughter. I know he's someone I'll vibe with for many years to come. I've recently learned more about his expertise beyond crypto, and it only deepened my respect for him. Bonus Fact: Cristian is a pro Twerker!"}

translation.translatedDescription: Cristian leads with love and positivity. His presence makes you feel warm and welcome in any community he is a part of. I had the great pleasure of meeting him in person at NFT NYC, and that only reinforced what I felt online. He is a gifted content creator who is able to pivot seamlessly from providing thoughtful analysis to contagious laughter. I know he's someone I'll vibe with for many years to come. I've recently learned more about his expertise beyond crypto, and it only deepened my respect for him. Bonus Fact: Cristian is a pro Twerker!

data.metadata: {"description":"Met Cristian through Abstract and we've been talking ever since. He's great at his craft with a lot of proven experience, also  such a great friend. Grateful for him!"}

translation.translatedDescription: Met Cristian through Abstract and we've been talking ever since. He's great at his craft with a lot of proven experience, also  such a great friend. Grateful for him!

data.metadata: {"description":"Eleni has always been there for me in every step of the way this year. \n\nShe is an authentic person, she will support you through and through and she will be good at what she does!"}

translation.translatedDescription:
Eleni has always been there for me in every step of the way this year. 

She is an authentic person, she will support you through and through and she will be good at what she does!

data.metadata: {"description":"Marcello is one of the best content creators in the gaming sector. His videos bring a lot of energy and clearly explain the topic. He conveys fun and makes you want to try the product. Besides that, he’s one of the most important figures in the Abstract ecosystem and a great friend."}

translation.translatedDescription: Marcello is one of the best content creators in the gaming sector. His videos bring a lot of energy and clearly explain the topic. He conveys fun and makes you want to try the product. Besides that, he’s one of the most important figures in the Abstract ecosystem and a great friend.

data.metadata: {"description":"White, in addition to being an excellent streamer, is also a person with a golden heart and very generous. I remember that on my birthday, even though we had only known each other for a short time, he gifted me 10,000 $pengu. Beyond the human side, he is an excellent content creator, and I’m sure that in the coming years he will establish himself in the space and many people will hear about him. I’m going all-in on White."}

translation.translatedDescription: White, in addition to being an excellent streamer, is also a person with a golden heart and very generous. I remember that on my birthday, even though we had only known each other for a short time, he gifted me 10,000 $pengu. Beyond the human side, he is an excellent content creator, and I’m sure that in the coming years he will establish himself in the space and many people will hear about him. I’m going all-in on White.

data.metadata: {"description":"Pavil is a very talented street artist and he has blessed us with his art on several occasions.  He is a lovely human and is well liked by many!"}

translation.translatedDescription: Pavil is a very talented street artist and he has blessed us with his art on several occasions.  He is a lovely human and is well liked by many!

data.author: 0xeA43D9d2b85a363d8e760F936b05978B853F24c4
data.subject: 0x26dD4199269bec9457F84ADb029dB917A910c711

translation.translatedDescription: Ayo, we didn't talk to much in DMs or in person. Met each other in Abstract, we both artists, both gigachads, both been on few spaces/streams. His penguins train forever in my heart lol & im sure that we will see much more art works for community from Bunya. No doubts that we will meet each other on more spaces in future & bring more attention to artists in web3, especially in Pudgy & Abstract Eco. Happy to support with review

data.author: 0xA96E173551f07aF35F2bc4cBCD8D3a21E8DA39BC
data.subject: 0x0559FB44AbE3b55074593E22d7E8DFC73750038a

translation.translatedDescription: Cristian leads with love and positivity. His presence makes you feel warm and welcome in any community he is a part of. I had the great pleasure of meeting him in person at NFT NYC, and that only reinforced what I felt online. He is a gifted content creator who is able to pivot seamlessly from providing thoughtful analysis to contagious laughter. I know he's someone I'll vibe with for many years to come. I've recently learned more about his expertise beyond crypto, and it only deepened my respect for him. Bonus Fact: Cristian is a pro Twerker!

data.author: 0x0559FB44AbE3b55074593E22d7E8DFC73750038a
data.subject: 0x68e33A587f1d697c5e0f8b8794cFA304B41a61e2
data.metadata: {"description":"I met Sanjay briefly through Elisa in Dubai. He was very warm and welcoming. I had no idea who he was or what his experience was in the space, then I found out he was this very well-known and recognized gaming + multi-chain creator.\n\nI have had the pleasure of watching him from the sidelines and through friends in common, and I have nothing but great things to say about his professionalism, his wit and quality content."}

translation.translatedDescription:
I met Sanjay briefly through Elisa in Dubai. He was very warm and welcoming. I had no idea who he was or what his experience was in the space, then I found out he was this very well-known and recognized gaming + multi-chain creator.

I have had the pleasure of watching him from the sidelines and through friends in common, and I have nothing but great things to say about his professionalism, his wit and quality content.

data.author: 0x0559FB44AbE3b55074593E22d7E8DFC73750038a
data.subject: 0x25954Fb49bFc6A2A09770be5CCA756c8676F31ba

translation.translatedDescription:
I had the pleasure of meeting Becca in Dubai this year for Token 2049. She was one of the kindest and nicest people to come up to me and involve me in the activities.

I was able to connect with her on a friendly level and realize what a hard-working woman she is. She is remarkable and has made so much impact in Web3, not only through her job at AP, but also in the wider Pudgy Penguin Ecosystem.

It's been a joy to watch her live her dreams, achieve her goals, and now being part of the team.

data.author: 0x0559FB44AbE3b55074593E22d7E8DFC73750038a
data.subject: 0xee15Bf34284464a7d41c6162DB0d364b3B6768CF
data.metadata:
{"description":"Marianne is an incredible human being, not only she is a good friend in the space, but also a skilled professional.

She has a masterclass when it comes to community building. By building Keewy she has demonstrated the entire space the importance of community retention through well-thought incentives, activations and content.

People in the space often forget how community is the backbone to every successful project, she has proven that. 

Besides building top tier communities, her skillset as a streamer and a content creator is top notch. Heavily respected in the space across chains, she has established herself as a rising star in Web3.

I'm grateful to have worked with her advising on projects within Abstract and will continue to do so if I have the opportunity!"}

translation.translatedDescription:
Marianne is an incredible human being, not only she is a good friend in the space, but also a skilled professional.

She has a masterclass when it comes to community building. By building Keewy she has demonstrated the entire space the importance of community retention through well-thought incentives, activations and content.

People in the space often forget how community is the backbone to every successful project, she has proven that. 

Besides building top tier communities, her skillset as a streamer and a content creator is top notch. Heavily respected in the space across chains, she has established herself as a rising star in Web3.

I'm grateful to have worked with her advising on projects within Abstract and will continue to do so if I have the opportunity!

data.author: 0x0559FB44AbE3b55074593E22d7E8DFC73750038a
data.subject: 0x2CCFF304eF578B238eE82E1D1d53c34e80B48ad6

translation.translatedDescription:
AL is an incredible guy. He's always super supportive of others in the Igloo and the extended pudgy community, a well as Abstract.

I find joy watching his journey in Web3 and how he includes his family, his lifestyle creating content for his audience.

I wish there were more people like AL!

data.author: 0x7A0c39684859b433f68635722d4Bb0960fa43D9e
data.subject: 0x216E6479AaD3E26fcA05a0921d3d7eB88071Bada

translation.translatedDescription:
I met N3XT through our mutual friend Elisa. N3XT is always very supportive of all of us in our friend group, he is often sharing great opportunities with all of us.

He is a kind person and great at what he does, with a lot of experience behind content and marketing.

data.author: 0xb7e9E82E858eBE4AF45F8F87E4D82E8CB23f8529
data.subject: 0x0559FB44AbE3b55074593E22d7E8DFC73750038a

translation.translatedDescription:
I’ve known Cris for a few months, and he’s been a person who constantly tries to provide value, and doesn’t participate in any drama.

A great person and a businessman in what he does.

data.author: 0x1b9f6d75372cF26874727d6a86BdD895950FdEF4
data.subject: 0x0559FB44AbE3b55074593E22d7E8DFC73750038a
data.comment: Great Marketer, Reputable Creator in Trad Fashion, Friend

translation.translatedContent: Great Marketer, Reputable Creator in Trad Fashion, Friend
translation.translatedDescription:
Cristian always shows up to give his best. He is a great friend, trustworthy, always willing to recommend others to roles or projects.

Not many people know this but he's also a very successful creator in the traditional fashion industry on Instagram.

Knows a lot about marketing, would recommend him as an advisor or contractor any day

translation.translatedDescription: So grateful to have met WW through Cambria/Abstract. He's a fabulous creator and always a pleasure to talk to or play games with. He's skilled in the space but also a really great and genuine person.

data.author: 0x50641a31170bdC620f1c90f00C9d8f8e6E095BD6
data.subject: 0x318D8ca3aD59f0ad3f1D63381638E5fAF9fC58Df
data.metadata:
{"description":"Gucci_GCC est super actif sur Abstract et ça se voit.
Il participe à tous les événements et jeux de la chaîne, et partage souvent ses résultats et analyses.
Il fait aussi attention à la sécurité et aime montrer des outils utiles pour protéger ses actifs.
Sa présence sur la chaîne commence vraiment à peser, et il influence de plus en plus la communauté.
Suivre Gucci_GCC, c’est toujours avoir une bonne idée de ce qui se passe sur Abstract."}

translation.translatedDescription: Gucci_GCC is super active on Abstract, and it shows. He participates in all the channel's events and games, and often shares his results and analyses. He also pays attention to security and likes to show useful tools for protecting your assets. His presence on the channel is really starting to carry weight, and he is increasingly influencing the community. Following Gucci_GCC always gives you a good idea of what's happening on Abstract.

data.author: 0xCfedD5b3aae8a2C0eB6cD94d547d971092C95029
data.subject: 0x253a41571830Dca332724DFF29Afb8960ffcCDf6
data.metadata: {"description":"Ely is a committed interviewer whose X posts sometimes feel provocative. I’m not a fan of how frequently he teases followers about going bald he needs to either embrace a full bald look to own the joke for his community or incorporate a subtle bald spot motif into an abstract logo for his redemption."}

translation.translatedDescription: Ely is a committed interviewer whose X posts sometimes feel provocative. I’m not a fan of how frequently he teases followers about going bald he needs to either embrace a full bald look to own the joke for his community or incorporate a subtle bald spot motif into an abstract logo for his redemption.

data.author: 0xdd9418830De1369F2ad0d8A9CAa98997675c07b4
data.subject: 0x26dD4199269bec9457F84ADb029dB917A910c711

translation.translatedDescription:
I know Bubya as a true artist in the Abstract ecosystem, someone overflowing with passion for Abstract Chain and Abstractio.

I’ve followed him on X for a long time, and every post he makes radiates pure creative energy, from 3D to 2D, from motion to animation, everything is top-tier.

data.author: 0xBA68C4D261220C8A22dC3A382911fd825Af9B050
data.subject: 0x26dD4199269bec9457F84ADb029dB917A910c711
data.metadata: {"description":"Bunya is an incredibly supportive and kind member of the Web3. His creativity and talent stand out and inspire others around him. His smile brings positivity and warmth to every interaction. I’ll never forget when he joined my stream and gifted me an NFT from his own collection — it was such a sweet and thoughtful gesture. It truly showed his generosity and positive spirit."}

translation.translatedDescription: Bunya is an incredibly supportive and kind member of the Web3. His creativity and talent stand out and inspire others around him. His smile brings positivity and warmth to every interaction. I’ll never forget when he joined my stream and gifted me an NFT from his own collection — it was such a sweet and thoughtful gesture. It truly showed his generosity and positive spirit.

data.author: 0x3B8fD3757D38E33E69BC40Dd9fF42fb0BEc35Ec5
data.subject: 0x4726A3f292468e1871A025c2649E6eD8B57D4007

translation.translatedDescription: WhitestWizard is undeniably a pure person. I met him on abstract and he is a great person. He has always been involved in abstract, he is part of a team that builds on abstract, he is also a very good streamer. Always there to animate and please his community. WhitestWizard is a sensitive person, if you understand him he will become your best friend. It took me a while to understand him, and I realize that we don't see many people like him anymore. I wish you all the best.
